title: The Living Forest
description: The new dimension of horror and darkness
body:
### **INTRODUCTION**

The Living Forest is a mod that adds a whole new dimension of horror. There are gonna be a several biomes,structures and creatures. The mod also add a new mechanic and a new type of food

### **CANNIBALISM**

If you are playing with your friends you can eat one of them. If one of your friends seems tasty to you just kill him and eat his corpse, It's easy as hell. Also after you "accidentally" killed your friend you cook his meat in a furnace to make it even more tasty.

### **Allseeing Woods**

Allseeing woods is the first and only biome in the dimension for now. This biome is full of stone creatures. Sometimes this creatures look similar, but do not let them deceive you, because it can cost you life.

### **Unseen Wasteland**
Unseen Wasteland is a sub-biome of Allseeing Woods. Unseen Wasteland is almost empty and only ruins show that some time ago there were many people living here. Talking about ruins, Ruins still contain food and other resources. But the ruins not the only thing in this wasteland. There are zombies that spawn in here, they are not really fast, but can deal you a big damage.

### **Ocularium Grove**
Ocularium Grove is also sub-biome of Allseeing Woods. Ocularium Grove is most dangerous biome of all three.

There are many types of monsters living here. One of them is Wooden Abomination. This creature tries to look like a tree, it almost not moving. You better go around it when you see it. Wooden Corrupter is also a creature that spawns is the grove. Corrupter is no danger by itself, he is weak. But he can infect you with Woodiness.

### **Woodiness**
Woodiness is a disease, that slowly turns you into a tree. Only milk can save you from becoming a part of the forest. But if you have no milk, you can craft a big empty bottle and find corrupted log. By right clicking on the log with empty bottle you fill it with blue pitch. Blue pitch is the only thing saving you from becoming a tree.
